name: Lost Alone
short_description: Lost in a dark, unforgiving forest, you must survive the night. Hunt for resources, stay hidden, and outsmart deadly werewolves that stalk the woods. Every sound matters. Every choice could be your last.
detailed_description:
You wake up alone in the middle of nowhere, surrounded by an endless forest and unsettling sounds in the distance. Your goal is simple: find a way out without being eaten alive. Survival isn’t guaranteed — fear, hunger, and thirst are just as deadly as what hunts you.

Explore a fog-choked world filled with danger and mystery. Craft improvised weapons to defend yourself, navigate twisting mazes hidden deep in the woods, and interact with the environment to uncover the pieces needed to repair a broken radio. Every choice matters, and every sound could mean something is watching.

This is a tense survival experience featuring a large explorable map, environmental interactions, resource management, and sudden jump scares. Stay alert, manage your hunger and thirst, and survive long enough to discover how you ended up here… and if escape is even possible.
